journal_date.text: ประจำวันที่

root.sql:
SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
,sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date,'SD MONTH YYYY') as journal_tdate FROM sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_fin_m_close_day WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin = '01' /*WHERE*/

r_tge_sheet_tran_nest_dr.sql:
select account_id , account_name , sum( dr_amount ) as dr_amount from ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name , sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount as dr_amount , sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date FROM sc_fin_journal_detail, sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.post_to_acc = '1' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_journal_detail.account_id and sc_fin_journal_detail.slip_group = sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.vourcher_group and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_book != '0' and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '+'
union all
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount as dr_amount ,sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date FROM sc_acc_journal_heading_firm ,sc_acc_journal_detail_firm ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = 'JV' and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.vourcher_group is null and sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount > 0 ) where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ and journal_date = {0}
GROUP BY account_id ,account_name ,journal_date ORDER BY account_id

r_tge_sheet_tran_nest_cr.sql:
select account_id , account_name , sum( cr_amount ) as cr_amount from ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name , sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount as cr_amount ,sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date FROM sc_fin_journal_detail, sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.post_to_acc = '1' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_journal_detail.account_id and sc_fin_journal_detail.slip_group = sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.vourcher_group and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_book != '0' and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '-'
union all
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount as cr_amount ,sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date FROM sc_acc_journal_heading_firm ,sc_acc_journal_detail_firm ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = 'JV' and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.vourcher_group is null and sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount > 0 ) where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ and journal_date = {0} GROUP BY account_id ,account_name ,journal_date ORDER BY account_id

r_tge_sheet_tran_nest_footer.sql:
select sum( cr_amount ) as cr_amount ,sum( dr_amount ) as dr_amount from ( SELECT CASE WHEN sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '+' THEN sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount ELSE 0 END as cr_amount , CASE WHEN sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '+' THEN 0 ELSE sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount END as dr_amount , 0 as c_begin ,sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date FROM sc_fin_journal_detail, sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.post_to_acc = '1' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_journal_detail.account_id and sc_fin_journal_detail.slip_group = sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.vourcher_group and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_book != '0'
union all
SELECT sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount , 0 as c_begin ,sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date FROM sc_acc_journal_heading_firm ,sc_acc_journal_detail_firm ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = 'JV' and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.vourcher_group is null ) where 1=1 and journal_date = {0}
GROUP BY journal_date
